item.title: IT Services
item.description:
Computer Services:

🌐 Explore the digital world with my help!

I offer you a range of computing services designed to make your life easier. I am happy to offer my help and expertise to anyone who has limited resources, cannot afford very expensive “professional” services, but needs some form of one-off or even regular help at an affordable price. It is in this area that I offer my services as a private individual, in a field where most service providers do not offer help.

My services include:

🖥️ Computer Education. Learn the basics or deepen your knowledge in the use of different software and applications in my individual, customized training sessions.

🔧 Hardware and Software Help: Whatever your problem, whether it’s a hardware glitch or software issue, I’m happy to help you find a solution.

🛠️ Repair and Training: In addition to troubleshooting, I’ll teach you how to do simple repairs at home. Learn the inner workings of computers!

💻 Building and Installing Operating Systems: I’ll help you build the computer of your dreams and install the operating system of your choice! Based on privacy and usability considerations, I can recommend and will be happy to help you revive your old computer with Linux desktop operating system and help you with maintenance if you need it.

💾 Data backup: Your important data needs to be safe. My professional data backup methods can help you ensure that your valuable information is not lost, or that you can protect it yourself!

🔒 Security Education: Learn the risks of the digital world! I can help you learn how to protect yourself against cyber threats.

🗣️ Advice: I will be happy to help you with advice tailored to your specific needs to make the most of your technology equipment and opportunities as a private individual! If you need it, I’ll also be happy to help you find the right equipment to buy for your needs to get the most out of your financial budget.

Why choose me?

I have many years of experience in the world of computing, I have assisted clients, friends, family, acquaintances, they all call me when they have computing problems. I can help you learn about open source software, find what you didn’t know you needed, what you can use for free at your convenience. Flexible services, customized solutions, by appointment and agreement. I don’t promise you the stars will fall from the sky, but I do promise you that I will do my best to serve you and find the right help and solutions to your problems.

If you are interested, please contact me on the contact details published on my website. You can send me an e-mail under the @ sign on the main page and you can also get my phone number by downloading my CV by clicking on “Download CV”.
